faqs.question: What spider species are most common in Gowanus?
faqs.answer: Gowanus properties typically see cellar spiders, common house spiders, wolf spiders, and occasionally black widows near the canal area. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to provide targeted treatment that eliminates current infestations and prevents future problems.
